title: New Order (disambiguation)
content:
'''New Order''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*[[New Order]], ideology of the [[Galactic Empire]].
*[[Grand Architect of the New Order]], a title used by the Empire.

==Legends==
*[[New Order/Legends|New Order]], which was the underlying ideology of the Galactic Empire.
*[[The New Order (song)]], a song by The Emperor's New Clothes from their album ''Totally Patriotic''.
*[[New Order Progressive]], the daily newsfeed of the following.
*[[New Order Party]], a pro-Imperial political party.
*[[New Order (Separatist)]], the Separatist Council used the term "New Order" to describe the new vision as represented by the Confederacy.
*[[New Order (Darth Caedus)]], Darth Caedus's view for the future of the galaxy as Chief of State.
*The [[New Jedi Order]].
*The [[One Sith]].
*The [[Rule of Two/Legends|Rule of Two]].
*''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 2: New Galactic Order]]''

==See also==
*[[New Jedi Order (disambiguation)]]
